feature_name: Rich symptom timeline and patient narrative intake
problem_solved: Short, single-symptom forms and rushed histories lose duration, severity, patient concern, prior failed visits, and functional impact before clinician review.
acceptance_criteria: Capability is source-linked, clinician-reviewable, patient language is preserved respectfully, ownership/closure states are auditable, and false-positive/false-negative monitoring is defined.
must_have_guardrail: keep narrative clearly labeled as patient-reported; summarize only clinically relevant deltas; allow clinician review/edit; support translation and accessibility

problem_solved: Hidden, chronic, fluctuating, and rare conditions may look non-urgent at a single visit unless the system captures deterioration from the patient’s personal baseline.
acceptance_criteria: Capability is source-linked, clinician-reviewable, patient language is preserved respectfully, ownership/closure states are auditable, and false-positive/false-negative monitoring is defined.
must_have_guardrail: show trend and examples rather than algorithmic diagnosis; calibrate alerts to persistence, deterioration, and red flags

acceptance_criteria: Capability is source-linked, clinician-reviewable, patient language is preserved respectfully, ownership/closure states are auditable, and false-positive/false-negative monitoring is defined.
must_have_guardrail: rank by current symptom relevance and recency; keep provenance; allow clinician suppression with reason

feature_name: Medication, access, and affordability as diagnostic clues
primary_user: patient; doctor; nurse; CHW; social worker
problem_solved: Medication interruption, inability to pay, lack of transport, or supply/device problems may cause deterioration or block diagnostic completion but are often hidden in clinical notes.
acceptance_criteria: Capability is source-linked, clinician-reviewable, patient language is preserved respectfully, ownership/closure states are auditable, and false-positive/false-negative monitoring is defined.
must_have_guardrail: ask neutrally; separate from adherence judgment; route aggregate stockout/access data to system managers; show support options

feature_name: Longitudinal unresolved-problem tracker / diagnostic episode layer
problem_solved: Multiple visits, labs, referrals, messages, and symptoms are treated as separate transactions, so no one sees the unresolved problem as one diagnostic episode.
acceptance_criteria: Capability is source-linked, clinician-reviewable, patient language is preserved respectfully, ownership/closure states are auditable, and false-positive/false-negative monitoring is defined.
must_have_guardrail: make clusters explainable; allow clinician merge/split/close with rationale; prioritize persistence + deterioration + red flags over volume alone
